channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/4/16)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈依然围绕着 AI 和编程工具在打转，特别是 **Claude Code** 和 **Codex** 相关的讨论非常火热。我发现大家不仅关心怎么用这些 AI 工具来写代码，更关心怎么**省钱、监控成本、解决实际开发中的痛点**（比如环境配置、卡顿问题）。同时，关于 **AI Agent** 和多智能体协作的新思路也开始出现，感觉这个领域正在从“能用”向“好用、可控”进化。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈依然围绕着 AI 和编程工具在打转，特别是 **Claude Code** 和 **Codex** 相关的讨论非常火热。我发现大家不仅关心怎么用这些 AI 工具来写代码，更关心怎么**省钱、监控成本、解决实际开发中的痛点**（比如环境配置、卡顿问题）。同时，关于 **AI Agent** 和多智能体协作的新思路也开始出现，感觉这个领域正在从“能用”向“好用、可控”进化。

item.title: yizhiyanhua-ai/fireworks-tech-graph
item.description: Claude Code skill for generating production-quality SVG+PNG technical diagrams. Supports 8 diagram types, 5 visual styles, and deep AI/Agent domain knowledge. | 近期热门 | 总 3020 stars
item.author: yizhiyanhua-ai

item.title: AgentSeal/codeburn
item.description: See where your AI coding tokens go. Interactive TUI dashboard for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor cost observability. | 近期热门 | 总 1827 stars
item.author: AgentSeal

item.title: OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS-Nano
item.description: MOSS-TTS-Nano is an open-source multilingual tiny speech generation model from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. With only 0.1B parameters, it is designed for realtime speech generation, can run directly on CPU without a GPU, and keeps the deployment stack simple enough for local demos, web serving, and lightweight product integration. | 近期热门 | 总 1051 stars
item.author: OpenMOSS

item.title: Mouseww/anything-analyzer
item.description: 利用 browser + CDP capture + AI analysis 傻瓜式生成 注册机 | 2API | 其他浏览器或应用行为 的协议分析文档 | 近期热门 | 总 810 stars
item.author: Mouseww

item.title: WeaveMindAI/weft
item.description: A programming language for AI systems | 近期热门 | 总 389 stars
item.author: WeaveMindAI

item.title: Manavarya09/design-extract
item.description: Extract the complete design language from any website — colors, typography, spacing, shadows, and more. npx CLI + Claude Code plugin. | 近期热门 | 总 337 stars
item.author: Manavarya09

item.title: xataio/xata
item.description: Open source, cloud native, Postgres platform with copy-on-write branching and scale-to-zero | 近期热门 | 总 331 stars
item.author: xataio

item.title: V-IOLE-T/hotmail-register-extension
item.description: 基于Outlook Email的Chrome扩展：支持OpenAI OAuth古法注册与账号标签管理 | 近期热门 | 总 286 stars
item.author: V-IOLE-T

item.title: wh0amitz/TailVNC
item.description: Tailscale-based Windows VNC persistence tool with Session 0 isolation bypass, embedding a full WireGuard peer and RFB server into a single drop-in binary. | 近期热门 | 总 213 stars
item.author: wh0amitz

item.title: Hainrixz/open-carrusel
item.description: AI-powered Instagram carousel builder. Chat with Claude to design slides; export as PNGs at exact Instagram dimensions. Type /start in Claude Code to bootstrap. | 近期热门 | 总 58 stars
item.author: Hainrixz
